feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Cloud Identity Services
feed.subtitle: SAP Cloud Identity Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SCIM SuccessFactors to CIS (IAS) custom fields, using api version 2
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to read a custom attribute from SF as it replicates into CIS (IAS)

The documentation around this isn't very clear, for example is the parameter sf.user.attributes valid for v2 of the api and if so, do I just need to add in the custom field name, or do i need to add in all of the defaults?

entry.title: SF IAS - How to only sync users who are part of a specific permission group in SF
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

we upgraded from ODATA Identity Provisioning Connector to SCIM Connector with SAP SF (sf.api.version 2).

In our IAS test environment I only want to sync users from a specific sf permission group. Only users who are part of permission group with group name T - IPS should be synced to IAS. 

How can I apply this criteria in my source properties and/or transformation settings? 

Currently applied in properties

sf.user.filter active eq "true"

sf.group.filter groups eq 'T - IPS'

seems to be ignored when running Simulate Job

In transformation tab of IAS source system I used standard code syntax provided by SAP https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/setting-up-sap-successfactors-with-identity-authentication-and-identity-provisioning-services/upgrade-from-odata-ips-co

entry.title: Errors during Read Jobs execution in Identity Provisioning - S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition activation
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently in the process of activating a SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition tenant. As part of the initial setup, we accessed the administrator console, created an additional user beyond the default admin user, and proceeded to execute the Read Jobs for the different source systems configured in the Identity Provisioning Service (IPS).

During the execution of the Read Jobs for the systems S4-my438910-source and IAS formy438924 - source, we encountered the following errors:

Error type 1 — User provisioning failures:

 
 
user:56309a19-64ec-45b8-92d3-1ef6fe509112,system=S4HANAmy438910 - target,time=2026-05-05T18:47:19.646+00,error=Person SALES.ADOPTION@STRUCTUM-CO.COM does not exist.,content=<hidden content> - Set property ips.trace.failed.entity.content=true to display the content of failed entities
 
 
user:63a9dc7c-f700-4521-ba3b-d6e44de2ea2e,system=S4HANAmy438910 - target,time=2026-05-05T18:47:19.816+00,error=Person OSCAR.QUIJANO@STRUCTUM-CO.COM does not exist.,content=<hidden content> - Set property ips.trace.failed.entity.content=true to display the content of failed entities

Error type 2 — Group provisioning failures (7 similar errors):

 
 
group:my39467937_SAP_CBC_CONSUMPTION_PROJECT_LEAD,system=S4HANAmy438910 - target,time=2026-05-05T18:47:20.174+00,error=HTTP operation failed invoking https://my438910-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/APS_IAM_SIAG_BROLE_SRV/Aps_Iam_Siag_Br_Dll('my39467937_SAP_CBC_CONSUMPTION_PROJECT_LEAD')?$select=ID,to_BusinessUserAssignment/PersonID,Description,%20to_BusinessUserAssignment/UserName&$expand=to_BusinessUserAssignment with statusCode: 400, Response: {"error":{"code":"005056A509B11EE1B9A8DBD9EA7BB778","message":{"lang":"en","value":"Malformed URI literal syntax"},"innererror":{"transactionid":"9FCE19A6C2AB341BE25A425D99E4EB99","timestamp":"20260505184720.1502620","Error_Resolution":{"SAP_Transaction":"For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details","SAP_Note":"See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"}}}},content=<hidden content> - Set property ips.trace.failed.entity.content=true to display the content of failed entities

Environment details:

  • Product: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Process: Initial tenant activation
  • Component: Identity Provisioning Service (IPS)
  • Source systems involved: S4-my438910-source, IAS formy438924 - source
  • Target system: S4HANAmy438910 - target
  • No custom transformations or filters have been applied — all systems are using predefined SAP configurations

We have not made any custom changes to the transformations or properties of these systems beyond what SAP provisions by default. We are looking for guidance from experienced consultants or SAP experts who have gone through this activation process and can help us understand:

  1. Why are users being reported as non-existent when they were created in the system?
  2. What is the recommended corrective action without deviating from the standard SAP-initiated configuration?

Any help or pointers to relevant SAP Notes or documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial account - Unable to login to CIS Tenant URL
entry.content:
Hello everyone.
 
Doing self-learning of BTP using trial account
I have created an subaccount names CTS-Test and subscribed to 'Cloud Identity services' and I can see it has subscribed successfully. However, I haven't received an activation email, neither I could login to CIS Tenant URL
When I try to login to CIS Admin URL using my email id # vipinmp@hotmail.com (for login) & password it gives message : Sorry, we could not authenticate you. Try again.
 
Global Account: dd174f31trial
Tenant ID: 3d692072-acc4-4a89-b9c3-45784f11e509
Subaccount ID: 3d692072-acc4-4a89-b9c3-45784f11e509
 
SAP Cloud Identity Tenant: auwpiz8lb.trial-accounts.ondemand.com
 
Pls help redirect me to correct forum, if I have posted this incorrectly here.
 
Thanks
Vipin

entry.title: Template for Importing Users into Cloud Identity Service
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We need to import 1000 users into Cloud Identity Service, but when we try to import them, we get a CSV format error: "The CSV file is invalid."

Could you please send us a valid format for uploading the users?

Thank you

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial account - Unable to login to CIS Tenant URL
entry.content:
Hi,
 
I am doing self-learning of BTP using trial account
I created an subaccount names CTS-Test and subscribed to 'Cloud Identity services' and I can see it has subscribed successfully
However I haven't received an activation email, neither I could login to CIS Tenant URL
When I try to login to CIS Admin URL using my email id # vipinmp@hotmail.com & password it gives message : Sorry, we could not authenticate you. Try again.
 
Pls help me with this issue or redirect to correct support link.
 
Details
--------------
 
Global Account: dd174f31trial
Tenant ID : 3d692072-acc4-4a89-b9c3-45784f11e509
Subaccount ID: 3d692072-acc4-4a89-b9c3-45784f11e509
 
SAP Cloud Identity Tenant : auwpiz8lb.trial-accounts.ondemand.com
 
Thanks
Vipin

entry.title: Corporate Idp || IAS tenant
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have setup trust between Corporate Idp and IAS tenant using SAML. Whereas applications like BTP we are configuring using OIDC with IAS tenant.

Could you please suggest if we also need to setup OIDC trust instead of SAML between corporate idp and IAS tenant ?

Regards,

Harshit Singh

entry.title: Calling SAP CAP API protected by SAP IAS from ABAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a SAP CAP app that uses IAS for authentication and authorization. The app is deployed on BTP and provides some UI5 apps via Workzone. This all works fine. The users have AMS capabilities assigned and can access the apps and call corresponding backend services. 

The app provides APIs that will be called from ABAP AS. ABAP will have RFC destination that points to API endpoints and will use oAuth2 for authentication. The destination itself will be consumed by ABAP programs. I would like to have two technical users that will have different AMS capabilities assigned. Here I am struggling how to define these users. I tried the following approaches.

1. In IAS, I generated a cert in section Client Authentication / Certificates of my app. I used it to setup oAuth2 profile in ABAP system. I am able to get an access token and authentication works fine. The problem is with authorization. API logs the following error "403 - Error: User 'system' is lacking required roles: ". The problem is clear to me but I have no idea how to assign AMS capabilities to this technical user.

2. I created a technical user in SAP IAS and assigned AMS capabilties to this user. The problem here is I have no idea how to use this user in oAuth2 profile in ABAP AS. If I have an IAS user, how can I use username/password of this user to call API.

The documentation seems to be really fragmented, having XSUAA and IAS does not help. How can this simple requirement of consuming CAP API from ABAP via technical user can be achieved? Is there a good tutorial for this?

Thanks

entry.title: Connectivity option not showing under application plans
entry.content:
Hi Team,

               We are trying to setup Joule for our S/4 backend system in non prod and completed the steps till 3.1 in the below blog 

Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Co... - SAP Community

              For step 3.2 we are not seeing the connectivity option for Cloud identity services under application plans i have attached the screenshot for the same. Can you please check and let us know the steps that we need to do enable the connectivity option

 

Regards

Venkat

entry.title: Is bulk resume screening posible?
entry.content: Being a Government PSU, we receive applications in very large volumes. Therefore, there is a requirement for bulk resume screening based on multiple parameters such as candidate age, caste category, interview score, and GATE examination marks after the initial shortlisting process. Additionally, the shortlisted candidates need to be ranked in descending order based on their overall merit scores.

entry.title: RNIF Format & Adapter availability in TPM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

There needs to be clarified on thing.

SAP current road map, RNIF Adapter and it’s format will be available in Q3? Could you please confirm this.

entry.title: Support Collaboration Analytics Card is not apearing
entry.content: We are unable to monitor the support proficiency card. Please enable the same.

entry.title: Feature Clarification & Roadmap Inquiry: FAPI 2.0 and DPoP Support in SAP Cloud Identity Service
entry.content:
We are currently architecting an integration between an application deployed on SAP BTP Cloud Foundry and Corppass (Singapore Government's Corporate Digital Identity). Corppass mandates FAPI 2.0 Security Profile compliance, which requires strict adherence to the following OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect advanced specifications:

  • Pushed Authorization Requests (PAR) — RFC 9126
  • Demonstrating Proof-of-Possession (DPoP) — RFC 9449
  • Sender-constrained access tokens (via DPoP or mTLS)
  • private_key_jwt client authentication
  • PKCE (S256) for all authorization code flows

Specific Questions:

  1. Current Support Status: Does SAP Cloud Identity Services (Identity Authentication / XSUAA) currently support PAR (RFC 9126), DPoP (RFC 9449), or the FAPI 2.0 Security Profile as an OAuth client (RP) ?
  2. Roadmap & Timeline: If not currently supported, is there a confirmed roadmap or planned release to enable these capabilities? We require this information for architectural planning and go-live scheduling.
  3. Recommended Architecture: If native support is unavailable, what is SAP's officially recommended approach for integrating FAPI 2.0-compliant external identity providers (e.g., Corppass, Singpass) with applications running on SAP BTP? Should we introduce an intermediate FAPI 2.0-compatible identity layer (e.g., PingFederate, Keycloak) between Corppass and SAP XSUAA?

entry.title: SAP Signavio - retrieve values from dictionary
entry.content:
Dear Experts from the community,

In Signavio modeller users can call/ search for dictionary entries in from a dictionary category.

The search for existing dictionary entries is based on the attribute "Title".

 

 

Is there a way to search in Signavio modeller for other information contained in a dictionary entry ? (e.g. contents form the description attribute or other custom attributes?

 

 

Would this be an interesting feature for the users of the community (find dictionary entries form other attribute values)?

 

SAP Signavio

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial Account Phone Verification Issue During Activation
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently trying to activate my SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Trial account, but I am unable to complete the phone verification process.

I did not receive the SMS verification code, and the platform displays the following message:

“We did not send a code because you are not authorized to request phone calls. Please contact your system administrator.”

This is a personal/student trial account, so I do not have a system administrator to contact.

I have already verified that my phone number is entered correctly in international format, but the issue still persists.

Could someone please advise how to resolve this issue or indicate the appropriate support channel for trial account verification problems?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: How can i configure SSO for SAP CLOUD ALM?
entry.content: How can I configure Single Sign-On (SSO) for SAP Cloud ALM?

entry.title: SAP build workzone
entry.content:
Hello all, Good Day,

Can we able the customize the buildworkzone login page in btp ?

Thanks,
Siva D

entry.title: Trial Cloud Identity Services: first administrator never received activation email
entry.content:
Hi,

I created an SAP BTP free trial account (created on 2026-05-28) and subscribed to Cloud Identity Services (Subscriptions / default plan, TEST) in my trial subaccount. The subscription shows as "Subscribed" and the IAS tenant appears to be provisioned:

- Tenant: a25augyla.trial-accounts.ondemand.com
- Account email: scarronefrancisco23@gmail.com
- SAP Universal ID: P2012547509

The problem: I never received the "Activate Your Account for Identity Authentication Service" onboarding email for the first administrator. I checked inbox, spam and all folders and it never arrived. Without it I cannot set the password for the admin user, so I cannot log in to the admin console (the /admin URL redirects to the tenant's own SAML2 IdP login and rejects my credentials).

What I have already tried, without success:
- "Forgot password" at https://adgpsxyq1.trial-accounts.ondemand.com/admin -> no reset email received
- Self-service page https://iamtenants.accounts.cloud.sap/ -> returns HTTP 500 (likely because this is a trial / Universal ID)
- Deleted and re-created the Cloud Identity Services subscription -> still no onboarding email

Could someone from the IAS team please check the provisioning status of this tenant and either re-trigger the administrator onboarding email, or confirm that the admin user (scarronefrancisco23@gmail.com) exists so that "Forgot password" can work?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: unable get email to set up password after i subscribed cloud identity services on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am using an SAP BTP Trial account and have successfully subscribed to Cloud Identity Services. But I am not getting email to set up my password.

I can log in to the SAP BTP Trial Cockpit using my registered email address without any issues. However, when I click "Go to Application" for Cloud Identity Services, I am redirected to the sign-in page and receive the error:

"Sorry, we couldn't authenticate you."

I have already tried the following:

  • Resetting my password in the Identity Authentication tenant

  • Logging out and logging back in

  • Using the same email address that works for the BTP Trial Cockpit

Thanks,

Gayathri.

entry.title: I never received onboarding email Activate Your Account for Identity Authentication Service for CIS
entry.content:
I am using a BTP trail account  and i " I never received the "Activate Your Account for Identity Authentication Service" onboarding email for the first administrator.  "  for the Cloud Identity Services.

I also tried to reset the Password , but never received an email to reset.

Can you please help to resolve this issue?
 
Appreciate your help
